km.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: អេវេសហាម, វូរសេសតឺសហីរេ, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell是William Trussell的兒子，於1250年出生在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。他於1270年與Roesia Pantulf結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1275年在他的家鄉享年25歲。

zh-hans.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell是William Trussell的儿子，于1250年出生在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。他于1270年与Roesia Pantulf结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1275年在他的家乡享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell was born in 1250, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England as the son of William Trussell. He married Roesia Pantulf in 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1275, in his hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell est né en 1250, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, fils de William Trussell. Il a épousé Roesia Pantulf en 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1275, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell wurde 1250 in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, als Sohn von William Trussell geboren. Er hat 1270 Roesia Pantulf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 25 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell è nato il nel 1250 nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England come figlio di William Trussell. Lui sposato Roesia Pantulf nel 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1275, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Trussellは1250年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムでWilliam Trussellの息子として生まれた。1270年にRoesia Pantulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1275年に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell(은)는 1250년 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 William Trussell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1270년 Roesia Pantulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 그의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell nasceu em 1250, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra filho de William Trussell. Ele casou-se com Roesia Pantulf em 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1275, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell родился в 1250 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия. Его отца звали William Trussell. Он женился на женщине по имени Roesia Pantulf в 1270 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1275 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Trussell nació en 1250, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra como hijo de William Trussell. Se casó con Roesia Pantulf en 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1275, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.

th.Evesham, Worcestershire, England: เอเวชม, วอรซสเตอร์ชิเร, เองกแลนด
